data.description: Max Miller has recently revealed his latest stock transactions.

data.title: US₮ selects Celo for expansion, offering compliant digital dollars to 4.23M users beyond Ethereum.
data.description: The regulated stablecoin USA₮, backed by Tether, has been introduced on the Celo network. This move aims to provide federally compliant digital dollars to the network's 4.23 million weekly active users.

data.title: Asset Panda Launches AI-Powered Platform to Modernize Asset Management for State and Local Governments
data.description: In a recent press release on March 31, 2026 from Frisco, Texas, Asset Panda introduced Ursa, a new AI-driven platform aimed at aiding state and local government agencies in overseeing infrastructure, equipment, and public safety assets with greater efficiency. Ursa is a cutting-edge technology designed to streamline asset management processes for government entities.

data.title: AMPLIFON INVESTS IN AUDIOLOGICAL RESEARCH AND INNOVATION WITH THE APPOINTMENT OF DR. NICHOLAS REED AS VP AUDIOLOGY INNOVATION & RESEARCH
data.description: Renowned specialist in audiology and public health, Dr. Reed has been appointed by Amplifon, the parent company of Miracle-Ear, as part of a newly created position. The global leader in hearing care services made the announcement on March 31, 2026. Dr. Reed's expertise in the field will bring valuable insight to the company's operations and research endeavors. Amplifon's decision reflects their commitment to advancing hearing health, with Dr. Reed's appointment being a significant milestone in this pursuit.

data.title: Guardian completes integration with FINEOS to expand digital capabilities and deliver a simplified leave experience
data.description: The company has introduced upgraded absence features, enhancing its capacity to provide a contemporary and interconnected leave system for employees and HR departments. This initiative aims to promote well-being®. The launch took place in New York on March 31, 2026. The updates are intended to improve the leave experience and support HR teams efficiently.

data.title: McDermott and Chiyoda Complete Construction and Commissioning of Golden Pass LNG Train 1
data.description: In Sabine Pass, Texas, McDermott and Chiyoda International Corporation (CIC) have almost finished constructing and commissioning Train 1 of the Golden Pass LNG Project. This project represents a significant milestone in the energy sector.

data.title: IBM and ETH Zurich join forces to shape the future of algorithms for the AI and quantum era
data.description: IBM and ETH Zurich have partnered on a decade-long program to enhance fundamental algorithmic research. This joint effort aims to create essential algorithms for the AI and quantum computing era. As part of the collaboration, IBM will assist in establishing ETH Zurich professorships dedicated to steering collaborative research ventures.

data.title: Unanet and CIO Steve Karp Receive Global Recognition for Results-Driven Artificial Intelligence
data.description: Unanet, a company based in DULLES, Va., was honored with a prestigious award for their exceptional utilization of artificial intelligence. This recognition highlights their transition from reactive intelligence to autonomous execution. Unanet, known for their AI-first ERP and growth software tailored for project-based businesses, received the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award for their remarkable achievements. This acknowledgment showcases their innovative approach and dedication to leveraging technology for success.

data.title: Logile Launches Fresh Operations Management Suite to Help Grocers Turn Fresh Into a Scalable Growth Engine
data.description: Logile, Inc., a prominent global provider of AI-driven Connected Workforce solutions, has unveiled its new Fresh Operations Management suite in Dallas. This innovative offering focuses on a revamped operating model tailored to the nuances of the fresh produce sector. The suite integrates customer demand, labor capacity, and cost visibility to streamline production, inventory management, waste control, and food safety practices. By harmonizing these components, the platform ensures efficient operations and enhanced performance.

data.title: Breakwall Capital and Vitol Announce the Closing of Valor Mining Credit Partners II
data.description: Breakwall Capital LP and Vitol have jointly closed Valor Mining Credit Partners II, L.P. (VMP II), following the successful deployment of their first partnership, Valor Mining Credit Partners, L.P., which invested around $470 million in less than six months. Breakwall Capital LP is an independent asset management firm specializing in the energy sector, while Vitol is renowned for its expertise in energy and commodities. VMP II is the latest venture in their collaboration to invest in the mining industry.

data.title: NeuroSense Therapeutics Reports Year End 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: In 2025, PrimeC transformed into a late-stage clinical asset with an FDA-approved Phase 3 program for ALS. The study showed a significant survival benefit, with a 65% decrease in the risk of death and a median survival advantage of over 14 months. These results were released in JAMA Neurology.

data.title: L'Mychele & Associates Earns WBENC Certification, Strengthening Its Position as a Strategic Leader in Meetings and Events
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Dallas, L'Mychele & Associates, a company focusing on executive summits, leadership retreats, corporate conferences, and exclusive experiences, achieved national recognition as a Women's Business Enterprise. This certification marks a significant milestone for the firm, emphasizing its commitment to diversity and inclusion.

data.title: Research Funding Available for Preeclampsia and Related Pregnancy Disorders
data.description: The Preeclampsia Foundation has shifted its focus for the 2026 awards towards promoting health equity and addressing HELLP Syndrome. In an announcement made in Melbourne, Florida on March 31, 2026, both the Preeclampsia Foundation and Preeclampsia Foundation Canada have started accepting applications for the 2026 Vision Grant research funding. This initiative aims to tackle critical issues in maternal health and support innovative projects. Researchers and organizations are urged to apply for this grant to aid in advancing knowledge and solutions in these areas.

data.title: SafeRide Health Ranks #14 on Inc.’s List of Fastest-Growing Companies in the Southwest
data.description: In San Antonio, a major player in technology-driven non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) services, SafeRide Health, has achieved the notable ranking of 14 on the Inc. 2026 Regionals: Southwest list. This recognition signifies the company's strong presence and impact within the region.

data.title: Enterprises Can Achieve 219% ROI With ManageEngine PAM360, Finds KuppingerCole Analysts Research
data.description: In Austin, Texas, ManageEngine, a division of Zoho Corporation, revealed the outcomes of KuppingerCole Analysts' evaluation of PAM360, its privileged access management platform. The assessment showcased that businesses utilizing PAM360 were able to generate a remarkable 219% ROI, with a payback period of around 3.8 months. This signifies a significant financial benefit for enterprises who implemented PAM360. The PAM market is evolving and the results of this assessment highlight the value and efficiency provided by ManageEngine's solution.

data.title: Ultra-Fast, Reliable Internet from Xfinity Now Available in Parts of Brantley County, Georgia
data.description: In Brantley County, Georgia, Comcast has recently extended its network to over 1,700 residences and commercial establishments across three Southeast Georgia towns. This expansion includes the communities of Atkinson, Nahunta, and Waynesville. The telecommunications company is providing high-speed Internet services through America's leading and dependable converged network. Through its Xfinity services, Comcast is offering a comprehensive solution that integrates Internet, mobile, entertainment, and smart home services, offering customers increased speed, cost-effectiveness, and autonomy over their connections.
